overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit futuristic city. The player walks along wet sidewalks past holographic advertisements and towering skyscrapers, occasionally looking up at the massive buildings and walking under elevated highways.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with holographic advertisements and street vendors

events.description: futuristic blue sports car drives past on the wet road to the right
passing a pedestrian with purple hair and red jacket walking toward the camera

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk past street vendors and neon signs, observing the city lights

notable_agents.action: futuristic blue sports car driving past on the wet road
pedestrian with purple hair and red jacket walking toward camera

entered.detail: large blue neon sign with Japanese characters mounted on building
large holographic advertisement for Battlefield game on building facade
tree with distinctive red foliage on the left sidewalk
rack with magazines and newspapers on the sidewalk

black and yellow bollards and railings separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked neon-lit street in a futuristic city, passing by holographic advertisements and street vendors. A blue sports car drives past on the wet road while pedestrians walk along the sidewalk, and the red foliage of distinctive trees contrasts against the dark buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district approaching city center towers

events.description: passing parked futuristic vehicles along the street curb

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street toward the towering skyscrapers visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive futuristic glass and steel towers with neon lighting rising in the distance
futuristic vehicles parked along the street curb

segments.scene_description: Continuing the walk toward the city center as massive skyscrapers become visible in the distance. The street is lined with parked futuristic vehicles and neon billboards, while the camera passes the distinctive red trees and moves deeper into the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon-like street between mega-skyscrapers with connecting skybridges

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and horizontal skybridges overhead
camera tilts back down to street level view

agents.ego_description: stops to look up at the massive architecture and illuminated skybridges between buildings

entered.detail: connecting bridges between skyscrapers with illuminated advertisements spanning the street
tall building with distinctive geometric grid facade and blue accent lighting
elevated highway or monorail track structure overhead

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the massive scale of the surrounding skyscrapers and illuminated skybridges connecting the buildings. The street becomes a narrow canyon of glass and steel, with neon advertisements covering every surface, before the camera returns to street level showing the approaching overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection under elevated highways with dense neon signage

events.description: walking under the overpass structure into a more open plaza intersection area
approaching a crosswalk with traffic lights and multiple crossing pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking toward and entering a large intersection with multiple crossing pedestrians and traffic lights

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in front of the camera

entered.detail: traffic signal with illuminated lights at the intersection
open paved area with crosswalk markings and multiple street crossings
illuminated pink and purple vertical light columns
multiple large screens displaying advertisements on surrounding building facades
black and yellow bollards and railings separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: Walking under the massive overpass structure into a wide open intersection plaza filled with neon signs and digital billboards. The area becomes more crowded with pedestrians crossing the street, while vertical neon pillars and traffic lights mark the crosswalk area in this bustling city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked futuristic city that evolves from a neon-lit street into a towering commercial canyon and finally a bustling central plaza. It begins by moving past holographic advertisements and street vendors, where a blue sports car glides across the wet road amidst contrasting red foliage. As the camera advances toward the city center, the street narrows with parked futuristic vehicles and billboards before tilting upward to reveal the overwhelming scale of skyscrapers and illuminated skybridges. The perspective then returns to street level, gliding through a canyon of glass and steel toward a massive overpass. Finally, the camera emerges from beneath the structure into a wide open intersection plaza, where vertical neon pillars and crowds of pedestrians fill the vibrant city center.
